file_insights.changes: Removed 9 lines of manual JSON file path declarations (CD_FILE, WATCH_CD_FILE), eliminated 3 try/except blocks for file I/O, replaced 6 distinct file operation patterns with 4 StateManager method calls
file_insights.reduction: 15 lines removed, 6 insertions added, net 9-line reduction
file_insights.complexity: Decreased: Direct file I/O with manual path construction replaced with centralized StateManager abstraction

file_insights.changes: Updated subtask-2-3 status from pending to completed, added detailed notes on implementation outcomes, updated timestamps
file_insights.tracking: Plan now reflects full state migration for Phase 2 subtasks 2-1 through 2-3

file_insights.changes: Added 157 lines documenting subtask-2-3 completion, including implementation details, pattern followed, code reduction metrics, and verification results
file_insights.documentation: Comprehensive session record with timestamps, commit references, and patterns established

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent replacement of direct file I/O (json.load/dump + try/except) with StateManager method calls
StateManager uses consistent verb-based API: get_*, set_*, in_* (for boolean checks), establishing predictable interface
StateManager initialized once per symbol in init_symbol(), then reused throughout main() execution context
Original cooldown logic (COOLDOWN_MIN=5, WATCH_CD_MIN=12, WATCH_NEW_ZONE_P thresholds) preserved unchanged during refactor
patterns_discovered.benefit: Functional equivalence guaranteed, reduces regression risk

gotchas_discovered.issue: state_manager.get_watch_state(SYMBOL) can return None, requiring defensive null-coalescing
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use `w = state_manager.get_watch_state(SYMBOL) or {}` pattern to safely handle missing state

gotchas_discovered.issue: Old code manually computed `COOLDOWN_MIN*60 - (time.time() - cd_t)`, new code delegates to StateManager
gotchas_discovered.concern: State calculation logic now hidden; harder to debug time-based edge cases without StateManager introspection

gotchas_discovered.issue: CD_FILE, WATCH_CD_FILE, TRADE_STATE were separate; consolidation required StateManager to handle all three internally
gotchas_discovered.risk: If StateManager file versioning/migration differs, could lose compatibility with legacy per-file state

approach_outcome.coverage: Cooldown check, watch state retrieval, watch state storage, cooldown duration setting all migrated
approach_outcome.quality: Cleaner, more maintainable code with centralized state handling; error handling now delegated to StateManager

recommendations.rationale: Phase 2 migration momentum established; 3 of 4 subtasks complete, minimal context switch needed

recommendations.action: Add StateManager introspection methods for debugging
recommendations.rationale: Cooldown remaining time now opaque; add get_cooldown_timestamp(), get_state_file_path() for troubleshooting

recommendations.action: Integration test: verify cooldown persistence across symbol restarts
recommendations.rationale: Cooldown state now consolidated in StateManager file; confirm COOLDOWN_MIN enforcement survives scanner restart

recommendations.action: Consider extracting cooldown logic into dedicated StateManager submodule
recommendations.rationale: 5 cooldown-related method calls in main() suggest potential for higher-level abstraction (e.g., CooldownManager)

recommendations.action: Document StateManager timeout edge cases (e.g., system clock drift, file locking during rapid restarts)
recommendations.rationale: Time-based state (cooldown_t, watch_t) now centralized; document assumptions about clock monotonicity
